title: Stay Ahead in the Job Search: Free Tools & Resources
subtitle: Each resource is free. Enter your email once per download and we’ll send it instantly.

items.title: Actionable Steps If You Are Getting Laid Off (Or Think You Might Be)
items.body: A practical playbook to protect your income, reputation, and next move — fast.
bullets: Immediate next steps to protect your career and finances

items.title: Resume Template

bullets: Highlights value in a hiring‑manager‑friendly structure

items.title: AI for Job Seekers: 2025 Guide
